impact_scope_adaptations.evidence: D-001 explicitly requires ToolContext as an additive public export and focused contract coverage; easyharness/__init__.py controls __all__ and tests/test_sdk.py contains the existing public-surface regression test.
impact_scope_adaptations.compatibility_impact: Additive public type export only; existing Agent, tool, and ordinary input contracts remain unchanged.
impact_scope_adaptations.verification: Focused schema, metadata, and direct-call regression tests were added but cannot run until the declared Strands dependency is installed.

impact_scope_adaptations.evidence: The plan references OpenSpec specification files, but this repository has no openspec directory; README.md is the available user-facing contract documentation seam.
impact_scope_adaptations.compatibility_impact: Documentation-only adaptation; no runtime or public API behavior was expanded.
impact_scope_adaptations.verification: README example was added and git diff --check passed.

recorded_execution_results: Implemented ToolContext marker, annotation classification, hidden schema construction, strict metadata alignment, public export, and focused regression coverage.
Verified by tests.test_sdk, which covers schema hiding, strict metadata rejection, nullable Context-only tools, and direct calls.
Implemented per-run and per-stream private invocation_state transport, early unknown-key rejection, and registered-name conflict detection.
Verified by tests.test_sdk for run, stream, sequential context values, unknown keys, conflicts, and concurrent private maps.
Implemented invoked-tool-only Context resolution, type and nullable validation, safe failure text, and separate public versus call arguments.
Verified by tests.test_sdk for missing and wrong-type Context failures, tool non-execution, and public event input visibility.
Documented the public contract in README.md and added contract regression tests.
Verified by 30 passing tests in tests.test_sdk, compileall, ruff check easyharness, and git diff --check.
